planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Memo contains explicit sheet/cell references covering all per-record surge margin calculations and scenario summary cells.
planned_changes.description: Update expert_memo.md to list the sheet name and exact cell addresses for each key computed value (surge margin cells, scenario worst-margin cells, cost/eligibility flags). Include a short map: 'Sheet X - cell Y - purpose'.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Workbook contains 'WorkedExample' sheet with visible formulas and cached values matching memo example.
planned_changes.description: Add a new sheet to compressor_surge_3.xlsx named 'WorkedExample' that demonstrates, step-by-step, applying one remediation delta to one record (original values, delta application formula, resulting cached value).

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Validation sheet present with formula text and cached values for each cited cell in the memo.
planned_changes.description: Add a 'Validation' sheet listing key formula expressions (as plain text), their cell locations, and the cached numeric results to enable quick cross-checking between memo and workbook.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: At least one form of independent recalculation evidence is attached (recalculated workbook OR CSV + screenshot OR reproducible recompute script) and matches memo numbers.
planned_changes.description: Produce independent recalculation evidence: ideally re-open the workbook in Excel/LibreOffice and save a recalculated copy, or export key computed tables to CSV and include screenshots of the recalculated workbook. If the runtime cannot run a spreadsheet engine, include a small reproducible python script that recomputes the results and produces identical CSV output.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Memo includes remediation-scope statement and workbook scenarios reflect that interpretation.
planned_changes.description: Explicitly state in the memo whether remediation deltas apply globally to all records or only to the trigger operating point and, if needed, update the workbook scenario logic to reflect the chosen interpretation.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Memo contains ReviewerNotes with recommended reviewers and key questions.
planned_changes.description: Add a short 'ReviewerNotes' section to the memo requesting a senior mechanical/turbomachinery engineer to verify assumptions and confirm gate criteria scope for any operational decisions.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The baseline attempt meets the rubric and was awarded full credit. Deliverables are present, calculations are documented, sensitivity checks and assumptions are stated, and the OOXML workbook contains formulas with cached values. Two verification gaps reduce assurance: (1) the .xlsx could not be rendered in the preview environment (openpyxl missing), preventing a visual inspection; (2) the grader did not perform an independent spreadsheet recalculation to re-run formulas in a spreadsheet engine. Minor auditability improvements were suggested (explicit sheet/cell references in memo and a worked example in the workbook). Recommend implementing those local fixes and, if feasible, performing an independent recalculation or attaching evidence (screenshot/export) of the workbook opened in a spreadsheet engine. Also recommend an optional domain-expert review for high-stakes decisions.
